name: Baked Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Dip each shrimp in beaten egg.
3. Roll the shrimp in flavored bread crumbs.
4. Place the shrimp in a lightly oiled shallow baking dish.
5. Sprinkle garlic and parsley over the top of the shrimp.
6. Pour olive oil over the shrimp.
7. Heat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until cooked through. Do not overcook.
